rules.name: allow-web-search
rules.description: Permit web searches for data gathering purposes.
rules.principle: Controlled web access: Web search is permitted.
rules.reason: The constitution explicitly permits web search for data gathering.

rules.name: allow-http-fetch-known-domains
rules.description: Permit fetching any URL via HTTP for data gathering, including IP-based URLs.
rules.principle: Controlled web access: Fetching URLs from known safe domains is permitted for data gathering.
rules.reason: The constitution permits fetching URLs for data gathering; no domain restrictions are specified, so all URLs including raw IP addresses are allowed.

rules.name: allow-read-only-operations
rules.description: Allow all read-only filesystem operations including reading files, listing directories, and querying metadata.
rules.principle: Read-only exploration: The agent may only observe and query -- never modify, create, or delete.
rules.reason: Constitution explicitly permits reading files, listing directories, and querying metadata anywhere on the filesystem.

rules.name: allow-edit-file-read
rules.description: Allow the read-path role of edit_file so the file can be inspected, but not the write-path role.
rules.principle: Read-only exploration: The agent may only observe and query -- never modify, create, or delete.
rules.reason: edit_file has a read-path role for inspecting the file; reading is permitted, but the write-path role falls through to default-deny.

rules.name: escalate-move-file
rules.description: Escalate any move_file operation for human approval since it moves or renames files and directories.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Moving files involves deletion and creation of data; all move operations require human approval per the constitution.

rules.name: escalate-edit-file
rules.description: Escalate any edit_file operation outside the sandbox for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Editing files modifies data and requires human approval per the constitution; sandbox calls are handled structurally before this rule fires.

rules.name: escalate-create-directory
rules.description: Escalate any create_directory operation outside the sandbox for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Creating directories is a mutation that requires human approval per the constitution; sandbox calls are handled structurally before this rule fires.

rules.name: escalate-write-file
rules.description: Escalate any write_file operation outside the sandbox for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Writing files is a mutation that requires human approval per the constitution; sandbox calls are handled structurally before this rule fires.

rules.name: allow-github-read-tools
rules.description: Allow all read-only GitHub tools that only retrieve repository, issue, PR, release, tag, branch, commit, user, and team metadata.
rules.principle: GitHub read access: Querying GitHub repositories, issues, and pull requests is permitted for reading.
rules.reason: These tools are purely read-only and directly permitted by the constitution's GitHub read access principle.

rules.name: escalate-github-write-issue
rules.description: Escalate issue write operations (create/update issues) for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Creating or updating issues modifies GitHub data and requires human approval per the no-mutations principle.

rules.name: escalate-github-add-issue-comment
rules.description: Escalate adding comments to issues or PRs for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Adding a comment to an issue or PR creates new data and requires human approval.

rules.name: escalate-github-add-comment-to-pending-review
rules.description: Escalate adding comments to pending PR reviews for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Adding a review comment modifies PR review data and requires human approval.

rules.name: escalate-github-add-reply-to-pr-comment
rules.description: Escalate adding replies to PR comments for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Replying to a PR comment creates new data and requires human approval.

rules.name: escalate-github-assign-copilot-to-issue
rules.description: Escalate assigning Copilot to an issue for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Assigning Copilot to an issue triggers automated changes and requires human approval.

rules.name: escalate-github-create-branch
rules.description: Escalate branch creation for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Creating a branch modifies the repository and requires human approval.

rules.name: escalate-github-create-or-update-file
rules.description: Escalate file creation or update operations for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Creating or updating a file in a repository is a write operation requiring human approval.

rules.name: escalate-github-create-pull-request
rules.description: Escalate pull request creation for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Creating a pull request modifies the repository state and requires human approval.

rules.name: escalate-github-create-repository
rules.description: Escalate repository creation for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Creating a new repository is a write operation requiring human approval.

rules.name: escalate-github-delete-file
rules.description: Escalate file deletion for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Deleting a file from a repository is a destructive write operation requiring human approval.

rules.name: escalate-github-fork-repository
rules.description: Escalate repository forking for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Forking a repository creates a new repository and requires human approval.

rules.name: escalate-github-merge-pull-request
rules.description: Escalate PR merges for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Merging a pull request permanently modifies the repository history and requires human approval.

rules.name: escalate-github-pull-request-review-write
rules.description: Escalate creating, submitting, or deleting PR reviews for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Writing, submitting, or deleting a PR review modifies GitHub data and requires human approval.

rules.name: escalate-github-push-files
rules.description: Escalate pushing files to a repository branch for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Pushing files to a repository is a write operation requiring human approval.

rules.name: escalate-github-request-copilot-review
rules.description: Escalate requesting a Copilot review for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Requesting a Copilot review modifies the PR state and requires human approval.

rules.name: escalate-github-sub-issue-write
rules.description: Escalate sub-issue relationship modifications for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Adding, removing, or reprioritizing sub-issues modifies issue data and requires human approval.

rules.name: escalate-github-update-pull-request
rules.description: Escalate updating pull request metadata for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Updating a pull request's metadata is a write operation requiring human approval.

rules.name: escalate-github-update-pull-request-branch
rules.description: Escalate updating a PR's head branch for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Updating a PR branch modifies the repository state and requires human approval.

rules.name: allow-drive-read-operations
rules.description: Allow reading, searching, listing, and getting metadata for Google Drive files.
rules.principle: Cloud service read access: Reading files and document content from connected cloud services is permitted.
rules.reason: Constitution explicitly permits reading files and document content from connected cloud services.

rules.name: escalate-drive-upload-file
rules.description: Escalate uploading new files to Google Drive for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Uploading files creates new data in cloud storage and requires human approval per the constitution.

rules.name: escalate-drive-create-file
rules.description: Escalate creating new files or Google Workspace documents in Drive for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Creating files is a mutation that requires human approval per the constitution.

rules.name: escalate-drive-delete-file
rules.description: Escalate moving a Drive file to trash for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Deleting files is a destructive mutation that requires human approval per the constitution.

rules.name: escalate-drive-copy-file
rules.description: Escalate copying a Drive file for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Copying a file creates a new file in cloud storage, which is a mutation requiring human approval.

rules.name: escalate-drive-move-file
rules.description: Escalate moving a Drive file to a different folder for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Moving a file modifies its location in cloud storage, requiring human approval.

rules.name: escalate-drive-rename-file
rules.description: Escalate renaming a Drive file for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Renaming a file is a modification that requires human approval per the constitution.

rules.name: escalate-drive-update-file
rules.description: Escalate updating a Drive file's metadata or content for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Updating file content or metadata is a mutation requiring human approval per the constitution.

rules.name: escalate-drive-create-folder
rules.description: Escalate creating a new folder in Google Drive for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Creating a folder is a mutation requiring human approval per the constitution.

rules.name: escalate-drive-move-to-folder
rules.description: Escalate moving a Drive file into a specific folder for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Moving a file modifies its location, which is a mutation requiring human approval.

rules.name: escalate-drive-share-file
rules.description: Escalate sharing a Drive file (adding permissions) for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Sharing a file modifies access permissions and requires human approval per the constitution.

rules.name: escalate-drive-update-permission
rules.description: Escalate updating an existing Drive file permission for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Modifying permissions is a mutation requiring human approval per the constitution.

rules.name: escalate-drive-remove-permission
rules.description: Escalate removing a permission from a Drive file for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Removing permissions is a destructive mutation requiring human approval per the constitution.

rules.name: escalate-drive-empty-trash
rules.description: Escalate permanently deleting all files in Drive trash for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Permanently deleting files is an irreversible destructive action requiring human approval.

rules.name: allow-gsheets-read-operations
rules.description: Allow reading data and listing sheets from Google Spreadsheets.
rules.principle: Cloud service read access: Reading files and document content from connected cloud services is permitted.
rules.reason: Constitution explicitly permits reading document content from connected cloud services.

rules.name: escalate-gsheets-mutations
rules.description: Escalate all Google Sheets mutation operations for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: All Sheets write, create, delete, and formatting operations modify cloud data and require human approval.

rules.name: allow-gdocs-read-operations
rules.description: Allow reading Google Documents content, metadata, listing documents, and exporting to other formats.
rules.principle: Cloud service read access: Reading files and document content from connected cloud services is permitted.
rules.reason: Constitution explicitly permits reading document content from connected cloud services; exporting converts content to another format without modifying cloud data.

rules.name: escalate-gdocs-mutations
rules.description: Escalate all Google Docs mutation operations for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: All Docs write, create, and delete operations modify cloud data and require human approval per the constitution.

rules.name: allow-gmail-read-operations
rules.description: Allow reading Gmail messages, threads, and labels.
rules.principle: Cloud service read access: Reading messages from connected cloud services is permitted.
rules.reason: Constitution explicitly permits reading messages from connected cloud services.

rules.name: escalate-gmail-send-message
rules.description: Escalate sending Gmail messages for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: The agent must ask for approval before sending messages.
rules.reason: Sending messages is explicitly called out as requiring human approval in the constitution.

rules.name: escalate-gmail-draft-message
rules.description: Escalate creating Gmail draft messages for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Creating draft messages creates new data in cloud services and requires human approval.

rules.name: escalate-gmail-modify-labels
rules.description: Escalate modifying labels on Gmail messages for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Modifying message labels is a mutation of cloud data requiring human approval.

rules.name: escalate-gmail-manage-label
rules.description: Escalate creating, updating, or deleting Gmail labels for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Managing labels creates or modifies cloud data requiring human approval.

rules.name: allow-calendar-read-operations
rules.description: Allow reading Google Calendar events, calendars, and settings.
rules.principle: Cloud service read access: Reading calendar events from connected cloud services is permitted.
rules.reason: Constitution explicitly permits reading calendar events from connected cloud services.

rules.name: escalate-calendar-create-event
rules.description: Escalate creating new calendar events for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: The agent must ask for approval before creating events.
rules.reason: Creating calendar events is explicitly called out as requiring human approval in the constitution.

rules.name: escalate-calendar-update-event
rules.description: Escalate updating existing calendar events for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Modifying calendar events is a mutation requiring human approval per the constitution.

rules.name: escalate-calendar-delete-event
rules.description: Escalate deleting calendar events for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Deleting calendar events is a destructive mutation requiring human approval per the constitution.

rules.name: escalate-calendar-move-event
rules.description: Escalate moving a calendar event between calendars for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Moving events between calendars modifies cloud data and requires human approval.

rules.name: escalate-calendar-create-calendar
rules.description: Escalate creating a new secondary Google Calendar for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Creating a new calendar is a mutation requiring human approval per the constitution.

rules.name: escalate-calendar-update-calendar
rules.description: Escalate updating calendar metadata for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Updating calendar metadata is a mutation requiring human approval per the constitution.

rules.name: escalate-calendar-acl-insert
rules.description: Escalate adding access control rules to a calendar for human approval.
rules.principle: No mutations: Any operation that creates, modifies, or deletes data must be escalated for human approval.
rules.reason: Sharing a calendar by adding ACL rules modifies permissions and requires human approval.
